response.original_title: Mark Antony and Cleopatra: The Worlds Most Infamous Love Affair
response.overview: Mark Antony and Cleopatra: The World’s Most Infamous Love Affair tells the dramatic true story of one of history’s greatest romances. Set against the backdrop of political ambition, war, and betrayal, the film explores the passionate and turbulent relationship between Roman general Mark Antony and Egyptian queen Cleopatra. As their love challenges the power of Rome itself, the couple are drawn into a deadly struggle for control, loyalty, and legacy. Blending epic spectacle with intimate emotion, this production brings to life a tale of desire, destiny, and downfall that has captivated audiences for over two thousand years.
response.title: Mark Antony and Cleopatra: The Worlds Most Infamous Love Affair
